introSection: Thunderchariot (Simplified Chinese: 雷霆战车) is a steel roller coaster located at Discoveryland in Dalian, Liaoning, China. It is a custom Thunderbolt installation from Italian company Zamperla. It opened for a preview between 1 October 2017 and 8 October 2017, before officially opening on 24 March 2018.
fullText: Thunderchariot (Simplified Chinese: 雷霆战车) is a steel roller coaster located at Discoveryland in Dalian, Liaoning, China. It is a custom Thunderbolt installation from Italian company Zamperla. It opened for a preview between 1 October 2017 and 8 October 2017, before officially opening on 24 March 2018.
